headline: California Carbon Rule Shift Recasts Valero Refining Costs And Risks
summary: California regulators have approved changes to the state carbon market that provide up to US$4b in additional free emissions allowances to oil refiners. Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) is among the refiners affected by these new allowances, which are intended to reduce regulatory compliance costs. The rule changes affect refiners operating in California, a key state for fuel demand and environmental regulation. For Valero Energy, a major independent refiner and ethanol producer, the new California...
